provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Agrochemicals Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Appointment of Registrar
provisions.content:
3. Appointment of Registrar
The Minister may, by notice published in the Gazette , appoint, subject to the laws governing the public service, any officer to be the Registrar of Agrochemicals, for purposes of this Act.

provisions.title: Functions of Registrar

definitions.definition:
any organic, inorganic or live biological material intended or offered for sale for purposes of—
( a ) destruction, control, repulsion, attraction or prevention of any undesirable life forms injurious to plant and animal growth
an agrochemical registration certificate issued under section 12(5)
the National Agrochemicals Committee appointed by the Minister under section 6(1)
to supply commercially and includes to transport, store and sell
a person appointed as an inspector of agrochemicals under section 9(1)
any writing, printing or illustration made on, or attached to an agrochemical or its container
an agrochemical licence issued under section 18(2)
the Registrar of Agrochemicals appointed under section 3
an agrochemical classified as such under section 12(5)
offer for sale and provision of goods as part of a service for agricultural use, whether or not the goods are described as free or included in the service.
